content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — demo credentials look real (review_information/demo_user.txt, demo_password.txt) but notes.txt is a placeholder ("n/a") and does not explain how to reach the subscription-gated core features (App/PaywallView.swift:7).
Pierre: Apple's reviewers need actionable notes to reach gated functionality; a login-gated app with a paywall (LoginView.swift SecureField, PaywallView subscription copy) needs steps explaining how the demo account unlocks blocking, schedules, and reports. The "n/a" in notes.txt may trigger review questions or a 2.1 metadata rejection. Replace it with concrete steps: sign in with the demo account, and state whether it has Premium pre-enabled or how to test the purchase in sandbox.
